etymology.description: Šłł(Šłł) (g─ô, "halberd") + Úşü(Úşü) (ku├ş, "chief; leader") = a type of halberd
etymology.interpretation: The character Šłú combines the semantic component Šłł(Šłł) (g─ô, "halberd") with the phonetic and possibly semantic influence of Úşü(Úşü) (ku├ş, "chief; leader"), indicating a specialized type of halberd, perhaps suggesting one used by a leader or chief.
